entry.title: Re: cost component structure split in SAP S/4HANA Public...
entry.content: Hi Buddy， I would recommend you to go throught the help doc link below for your issue https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/7f47a6d9441c46ac86c96fd27f6015f0/82a6d7531a4d414de10000000a174cb4.html?locale=en-US Best regards, Bob

entry.title: Re: Is extensibility possible to upload more than 999 lin...
entry.content:
Hello Ajit, Thanks for your interest on the Upload Customer Open Items App.

You mentioned two limitations:

  1. For one invoice, you can enter max 999 line items
  2. You can enter max 2000 lines in the excel file for uploading. (which means in extrem case, if each invoice has 999 line items, then you can input only 2 such invoices in the excel file)

As to the first limitation, We are working on a standard solution, then you will be able to upload a invoice with more than 999 line items and post this invoice. Such solution planned be released in next major cloud release (2502)

As to the second limitation, we limit 2000 line items due to performance consideration. What is your expected line items in your case?

Best Regards,

Victor

entry.title: Migration from RHEL6.6 in on-premise to RHEL 7.x in AWS environment
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

We plan to migrate the current ERP6.0 system running in the on-premise environment to AWS environment.

The current ERP6.0 system is utilizing "OS: RHEL 6.6 ,DB :OracleDB IP_ADDRESS" .

As we cannot use RHEL6.6 in AWS environment, we must use RHEL7.x in AWS environment.

If we migrate the current ERP 6.0 system running on RHEL 6.6 and Oracle DB IP_ADDRESS in the on-premise environment to the server running RHEL 7.x and Oracle DB IP_ADDRESS in AWS environment, 

can you please tell us if there is anything we need to do on the RHEL 7.x and Oracle DB IP_ADDRESS server side?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Migration from RHEL6.6 in on-premise to RHEL 7.x in A...
entry.content:
Migrating an ERP system to AWS involves several steps and considerations. Since you are moving from RHEL 6.6 to RHEL 7.x, there are some key differences between the two operating systems that you need to account for. Here are some general steps and considerations for your migration:

  1. Compatibility Check: Ensure that your ERP 6.0 system is compatible with RHEL 7.x. Check with the ERP vendor for any specific requirements or compatibility issues.

  2. Update and Patch: Before migrating, make sure that your current system is fully updated and patched. This will help to minimize compatibility issues during the migration.

  3. Backup: Take a full backup of your ERP system, including the database and any customizations, configurations, and files.

  4. AWS Preparation:

    • Set up your AWS environment, including VPC, subnets, security groups, IAM roles, and policies.
    • Choose an appropriate EC2 instance type for your ERP system.
    • Set up your storage on AWS (EBS, S3, etc.) according to your performance and redundancy requirements.

  5. RHEL 7.x Preparation:

    • Install RHEL 7.x on your AWS EC2 instance.
    • Apply the latest updates and security patches to RHEL 7.x.
    • Install any required libraries or dependencies that your ERP system may need.
    • Adjust system parameters and kernel settings as per the requirements of the ERP system and Oracle DB.

  6. Oracle DB Preparation:

    • Install Oracle DB 12.1.0.2 on RHEL 7.x, ensuring it matches the configuration of your on-premise setup.
    • Apply any patches or updates to Oracle DB to match the on-premise version.
    • Configure the database with the same parameters and settings as your on-premise environment.

  7. Data Migration:

    • Migrate the database using tools like Oracle Data Pump, RMAN, or AWS Database Migration Service (DMS).
    • Test the data integrity and consistency after migration.

  8. Application Migration:

    • Transfer the ERP application files to the AWS environment.
    • Update any configuration files to reflect the new environment (e.g., database connection strings, file paths).

  9. Testing:

    • Perform thorough testing in the AWS environment to ensure that the ERP system is functioning correctly.
    • Test all functionalities, including transactions, reports, and integrations.

  10. Update DNS and Networking:

    • Update DNS records to point to the new AWS environment.
    • Ensure that all networking is correctly configured, including VPNs or Direct Connect if necessary.

  11. Monitoring and Optimization:

    • Implement monitoring solutions to keep an eye on the performance and health of your ERP system.
    • Optimize the system based on the performance data collected.

  12. Documentation and Training:

    • Update your documentation to reflect the new environment and any changes made during the migration.
    • Train your staff on any new procedures or tools related to the AWS environment.

  13. Go-Live and Support:

    • Plan a go-live date and ensure that you have support in place for any issues that may arise during the transition.

Remember, this is a high-level overview, and each migration will have its own unique challenges and requirements. It's crucial to work closely with your ERP vendor, Oracle, and possibly an AWS consultant to ensure a smooth migration. Additionally, consider the AWS Well-Architected Framework to ensure best practices in security, reliability, performance efficiency, cost optimization, and operational excellence.

entry.title: Re: Integrate Jira with SAP CPI - Create Jira ticket via SAP CPI
entry.content: Hello,

entry.title: Re: Integrate Jira with SAP CPI - Create Jira ticket via SAP CPI
entry.content: Hello, once the content type is maintained as application/json, this issue is solved.

entry.title: Re: SAP Data Warehouse Cloud connect to PostgreSQL
entry.content:
Hi kpsauer,

Can we do Pull and push data from PostgreSQL(MDO)(Cloud) to SAP Datasphere? with JDBC or any other way?

Kind regards

Tejas

entry.title: Re: Request to host a CodeJam in Bangalore
entry.content:
Dear Shilpa,

Thank you for considering my request. At Henkel, we believe we have a strong competency in topics like Build, CAPM, and RAP, thanks to our extensive development efforts supported by SAP. Therefore, we are now interested in exploring advanced event mesh or machine learning.

I would greatly appreciate it if you could share any opportunities for conducting a CodeJam on other newly released topics from SAP side.

Thank you.

entry.title: Purchase Requisition screen controls
entry.content:
Dear all,

In PR creation-ME51N (& change-ME52N) screen, i want to make the below changes. where can i configure the changes.

1. I am able to save the PR by maintaining past Delivery date, which the system should not allow, an error message should be shown. 

2. Requisition date can be maintained with past and future date, which should not be allowed, always the PR should be created in the Current Date, an error message should be shown when user enters a past/future date. or else, the system should by default take the Currernt date and the field should be greyed out so that user cannot make any changes. (refer above pic)

3. system allows user to maintain PR Release date in past date, which should not be allowed, the Release date can never be in the past date. (refer above pic)

4. For material PR, the Account Assignment Category tab in the Line Item (Fund, Fund Centre & Commitment Item) details is fetched automatically, but all are enabled i.e, user can still modify the fields which should be greyed out and the users should not be able to modify.    

please guide me the configuration steps and path for doing the above.

entry.title: Re: SAP
entry.content: Try to indicate an adequate question title.

entry.title: Re: An Introduction to Hierarchy with Directory in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

THANK YOU for the good overview of the current functionalities regarding hierarchies. The functions that are not yet supported are particularly interesting, as a very important function for us is currently missing.
The authorizations in BW4 (analysis authorizations) are based on two authorization-relevant characteristics (profit center and org unit). In each case on hierarchy nodes.

There is currently no authorization function in the Datasphere for hierarchy nodes.
I have not found anything about this in the DSP roadmap explorer either. So the topic does not seem to be relevant for SAP at the moment.
However, I can hardly imagine that only a few other customers want to authorize this.
This means that Datasphere is currently not a replacement/addition for us with regard to authorizations for hierarchies, as the hierarche node authorizations are not possible.

Are there any work arounds?

Two more questions (nothing was mentioned here):
Are there version-dependent hierarchies (as in BW)?
Are there intervals (not just single values) possible in characteristic nodes in hierarchies?


Best regards

entry.title: EPM 刷新出现错误

HTTP Status:400
[{"code":"SY_530","description":"出现异常","severity":"error","log_id":"VoeogAEF7k{HWRCU627ucm","variables":[{"key":"DATAVALUE","value":""},{"key":"MDX","value":""},{"key":"V1","value":""},{"key":"V2","value":""},{"key":"V3","value":""},{"key":"V4","value":""}]},{"code":"UJ0_EXCEPTION_005","description":"出现异常","severity":"error","log_id":"VoeogAEF7k{HWRCU627ucm","variables":[{"key":"FUN_NAME","value":""},{"key":"OBJ_NAME","value":""}]}]

Class:CL_UJO_QUERY_BASE Method:DO_QUERY_CORE Line:226 Text: 出现异常
Class:CL_UJO_QUERY_BASE Method:RUN_RSDRI_QUERY_CORE Line:328 Text: NetWeaver BW 出错

entry.title: Focused Build SP14: General improvements in Mass Change Operations and Requirements Management apps
entry.content:
Introduction

With the release of ST-OST Support Package 14 (SP14) for Focused Build in SAP Solution Manager, we have come up with some new and exciting features in Mass Change Operations application and Requirements Management application. The release also contains improvements in some areas of these applications. You can find more information about all the improvements in different areas of the Requirements-To-Deploy process in this blog. 

Mass Change Operations: 

Change of Project Name and Project Phase for Defect Corrections:

In the Defect Corrections process type, users can now modify the Project Name and Project Phase columns in the result list table, provided the following prerequisites are fulfilled:

An Open Defect Correction:

  • is set to a user status below 'Handed Over to Release', and
  • has the Priority 'Medium' or 'Low' and
  • has no Work Package Assignment.

Changing only the project name for a defect correction is not permissible. If a project name is selected without selecting any project phase, an error message is raised at the line-item level in result list table and at the field level in the Mass Change dialog.

Fig 1. Mass Change Operations - Defect Corrections Screen

In addition to this, the value help for Project Phase would list only those project phases for the selected project name which fulfil the below condition:

  • The status of the release assigned to project phase must be Prepare or Build. Reassignment is not allowed for the Release Phase 'Created'.
  • If the open Defect Correction has a DocFlow/Task List Assignment, then the Target Release, that is assigned to the selected Project Phase for reassignment, must have a Task List as well.
  • If the open Defect Correction does not have a DocFlow/Task List Assignment, then the Target Release, that is assigned to the selected Project Phase for reassignment, must not have a Task List as well.

The Project Phase value help in the Mass Change dialog also follows the above conditions for the display of project phases.

Redesign of Mass Change Dialog as per SAP Fiori Design Guidelines:

The re-design of Mass Change Dialog is now extended to all the process types. The new Mass Change Dialog follows the SAP Fiori Design guidelines and has the same behavior that was introduced in the Mass Change Dialog for Requirements process type in the past. Please refer this blog for more information.

Requirements Management: 

Assignment of Work Packages to Requirements with no Solution Documentation:

Users can now assign Work Packages, whether they are assigned to a Solution Documentation or not, to Requirements that do not have a Solution Documentation assigned.

In the past, the Assign Work Package dialog would default the Solution filter to 'No Solution' if the selected requirement in the work list had no Solution Documentation assigned to it. This behavior restricted the users from assigning Work Packages with Solution Documentation to such requirements.

Fig 2. Previous behavior - Solution filter was defaulted to 'No Solution'

With the recent update to the Assign Work Package dialog, the Solution filter becomes editable when the selected requirement has no Solution Documentation assigned. This will allow users to search for Work Packages with or without Solution Documentation.

Fig 3. Updated behavior - Solution filter is now editable only for Requirements with No Solution

It is important to note that there is no change in the behavior for Requirements with Solution Documentation. The filter for Solution in Assign Work Package dialog will remain non-editable in such cases.

This fix is available till ST-OST Support Package 12 (SP12) for Focused Build in SAP Solution Manager.

Redesign of WRICEF Sub-Classification field:

Fig 4. Re-designed UI field for WRICEF Sub-classification

The WRICEF Sub-Classification field has been updated to include standard SAPUI5 control, enhancing accessibility and aligning with our product standards. The core functionality of the field remains the same. However, this field has been updated throughout our Focused Build Fiori applications.

Key Takeaways:

  1. Project name and Project phase can be changed from the result list for open Defect Corrections in Mass Change Operations provided certain criteria are met.
  2. The new Mass Change Dialog in accordance with Fiori Design guidelines is now available for all the process types in Mass Change Operations.
  3. Work Packages with Solution Documentation can now be assigned to Requirements that do not have any Solution Documentation assignment.
  4. WRICEF Sub-classification field is re-designed using a standard SAPUI5 control to enhance accessibility. There is no change in the core behavior of the field.

Please feel free to leave feedback in the comment section or submit any questions you may have on this page. You are also encouraged to follow SAP Solution Manager and Focused Build for SAP Solution Manager to stay updated with the new features and improvements.

Important Links and Resources

  • Usage Rights
  • Unwrapping the Latest Innovations: Support Package 14 for Focused Build 
  • Learn how SAP Activate and Focused Build with SAP Solution Manager is working together
  • ALM Community page

entry.title: Re: Contract Request document could not be sent to the external system. Error Message: Response retu
entry.content: any resolution to this?

entry.title: Unable to use req.error to throw error if one of the attachment fails
entry.content:
I am from SDM CAP plugin team. user uploads attachments and click on save and all these attachments get saved to SDM repository. One flow here is suppose there are 5 attachments and out of these 5 if 1 attachment is virus prone and clicked on SAVE sdm throws error for virus attachment and other 4 are saved. We want to throw error on UI saying the particular attachment has failed but using req.reject or req.error is not helping because even 4 attachments are saved to SDM repo they are not saved to attachments database ending up with the whole request rejected in draft mode. 

Any solution for this.

entry.title: Re: SAC planning model - delete duplicate records
entry.content:
Apologies @JefB, I've tried to code from @MichalCK and to give a snipped of what I've resulted in the error mentioned in my previous message:

This was the closest I came to trying his code.

So indeed the challenge I'm facing is that I have duplicated records where the record is once with Dimension "Deelneming" filled (anything else then "#") and once with it being "#". 

However, I also have cases of Dimension "Deelneming" being "#" where it doesn't contain another value. Those cases I don't want to delete but I only want to delete the cases of the duplicate records.

Hope that makes it a bit more clear, if not please let me know what additionally I need to share to give you a better idea.

entry.title: Can SAP Authenticator add two authentications？
entry.content:
Now I've used two different IdPs.   https://haas.accounts.ondemand.com/  and    https://accounts.sap.com 

But SAP Authenticator can only add validation for one of them at a time.

Can SAP Authenticator add two authentications？

This is meant for purpose of developing and creating  the GenAI use cases by interfacing the native cloud services. 

In case you are not able to guide, kindly suggest who can help. 

 Thanks 

Hemant

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

Regards,

Reene

entry.title: Re: MRP Run Parameters of the Monitor material coverage app
entry.content:
Hi Suresh,

Thank you for your question. The Regenerative Planning checkbox is always selected automatically, to make sure that all materials are included in the MRP run. This is a default setting in S/4HANA Cloud and cannot be changed. The checkbox itself is only displayed for information purposes, so that material planners are aware of how the MRP run is performed. We will improve the documentation for the checkbox to include this information.

Best

Antje

entry.title: Re: No Available Stock error in Batch Split (VL02N)
entry.content:
Hello @ArnoBrouwer 

Best before date is not a problem here. Look at the screenshot attached to the original question - it says that selection is executed without selection criteria. The batch is selected but it doesn't have enough available stock. Actually it is not a real problem, it is just a regular business situation. There is not enough stock to cover the delivery. 

The problem is that OP is not able to analyze stock availability.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: SAC planning model - delete duplicate records
entry.content:
Hi @MaxT,

there is an issue in your code line 3, please try to use

IF RESULTLOOKUP() / RESULTLOOKUP([d/Deelneming] = #GROOTBOEKREKENING) < 1

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK SDK installation error
entry.content: @Jitendra_Kansal @fjcarrasco the given troubleshoot guide link is not working, it says page not found. Can you share the latest link please ?

maybe you can answer my question: we have to replace SAP CS Modul by the S/4 Hana Service, where we will use the Service Orders. It it possible to book CATS based on S/4 Hana Service Orders instead of an CS-Order?

 

thanks a lot Ursula

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK SDK installation error

entry.title: Shipping Point assign to several Plants which are in more than one country.
entry.content:
Hello, Gurus

According to the Learning Hub,

Global entities can be assigned to organizational structures in one or more countries. For example, a Shipping Point can be assigned to several Plants which are in more than one country.

Is it possible ? 

Thank you in advance

Park.

entry.title: Re: Download software before the end of maintenance

But the question is that if we have a perpetual license, should not be allowed to download it? including the patches till the moment we stopped the maintenance? As commented we are entitled to do it, but seems impossible to get a clear answer from SAP

entry.title: Supplier evaluation
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

I need to configure supplier evaluation in current system.

But I have no idea from where I start.

Please guide steps so that successfully create the same. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Supplier evaluation
entry.content:
Dear customer, 

 

In order to implement supplier evaluation, please, check the relevant documentation in fiori library and SAP help: 

https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F2019')/S28OP

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/af9ef57f504840d2b81be8667206d485/74dce2577341bd12e10000000a4450e5.html?locale=en-US

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/af9ef57f504840d2b81be8667206d485/4dd9145627e5410ee10000000a441470.html?locale=en-US

 

I have sent you the links for overall supplier evaluation, but you can check the rest of the apps if required by navigating from the previous links. Also, please, check the following KBAs so you make sure you do not miss the most relevant configuration steps: 

2843857 - How to maintain the supplier evaluation scores

2585540 - No data in Supplier Evaluation apps - SAP S/4HANA

3205517 - Supplier Evaluation apps are not given correct scores

 

Thanks and regards, 

 

Maria

SAP Product Support

Digital Business Services

entry.title: Re: Create A/R Invoice + Payment using Service Layer
entry.content:
Hi ivarsk2,

As far as I know, it is not possible in Service Layer.

You will have to do it separately only but can be done in a single request.

In a Batch request, create the Invoice first and later create the Payment for the created Invoice.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Forecast prediction periods - SAC
entry.content:
Hello, 
I'm struggling with prediction both in classic and in optimized story:
Classic story: 
I've created a report with actual from January to October - and I want to create a 12 months predictive forecast.
But for some reason both my chart and table, let me forecast only one month
and I can't find where to change this default.
how can it be changed?

Optimized story: 

I can't find how to add the predictive forecast at all, it's not in the menu nor in the chart options:
How does it work?

 

 

 

thank you

entry.title: CAP-App deployment stops without error message
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
I have a problem deploying a CAP app. At a certain point the deployment stops and does not continue. There is also no error message.

The process seems to stop here and nothing more happens. Nothing seems to arrive in the database either.
thanks
Heinrich

entry.title: Void unused cheque
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

How to void unused cheque in SAP Public cloud?

We are unable to find the option in manage outgoing checks application.

In on premise we could do so using transaction code FCH3.

Thanks!!

entry.title: Bybit Referans Kodu: ATA1881 (2024 En Güncel Davet Kodu)
entry.content: Bybit referans kodu ATA1881 ile kayıt olarak %30 komisyon indirimi ve 1000$'a varan kayıt bonusundan yararlanabilirsiniz. Bu kodu Bybit'in kayıt sayfasında referans kodu alanına girerek avantajlı teklifleri kullanabilirsiniz.

entry.title: Re: Replicating SuccessFactors Entities to SAP HANA Cloud...
entry.content: Use multiple standard iFlows to replicate SuccessFactors entities into SAP HANA Cloud, though it requires possibly more configuration. Alternatively, a custom iFlow can provide a comprehensive solution with more development effort. If available, SAP Data Services should be also handle this replication, supporting various data sources and complex transformations.

entry.title: Solution for US Payapp in construction
entry.content:
Hi

we are doing construction projects in the US and have to provide payment applications following the rules of the AIA. We were looking for a standard solutiuon in SAP but could not find anything. 

We have now implmented it with a  sales order with Sales Bom to have a prefined structure to cover all relevant information, like values to be billed, Retention and so on. For each payapp of a project, we create new entries in the billing plan of the involved items. The printout will be based on the SD invoice, but the print programm will get the printed information not only from the current invoice but will collect the Information from the comlete document flow. 

Does anybody else did face the question to realise a payapp in SAP? How did you solve the problem?

entry.title: Re: Creating VOFM custom routine, functionality same as SAP standard routine 103 with Additional Fun
entry.content: Very useful document. Thanks for sharing and guiding.

entry.title: Re: MRP Run Parameters of the Monitor material coverage app

entry.title: Re: UI5 – Navigate with Nested Components
entry.content:
Hi Graham, thanks for this blog.

I am wondering, is it possible to use that kind of approach when we have two separate apps deployed to SAP Gateway?

We would like to navigate from one(master app)to another (child app).

Child app would be a detail screen in flexible column layout of a master app.

Any adivce?

 

Thanks in advance! 

Kamil

entry.title: Re: Usage of ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) for developments in SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hello, for the automatic ATC check in the transport release, it's only possible to define one variant. The problem is when you have Tier 1, 2 and 3 developments in S4.
How can we define the automatic check variant according to package or object scope or Tier?

Thank you.

entry.title: Bybit-Empfehlungscode: ADLER1909 (Neuester Einladungscode für 2024)
entry.content: Durch die Registrierung mit dem Bybit-Empfehlungscode ADLER1909 können Sie von einem Provisionsrabatt von 30 % und einem Registrierungsbonus von bis zu 1000 $ profitieren. Sie können vorteilhafte Angebote nutzen, indem Sie diesen Code in das Feld "Empfehlungscode" auf der Registrierungsseite von Bybit eingeben.

entry.title: Re: SAC planning model - delete duplicate records
entry.content: @MichalCK, I was aware of that. I tried your suggestion too but then I got this error message instead:

entry.title: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Sandbox APIs not working
entry.content:
In SAP Business Accelerator Hub the SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Sanbox APIs are not working. Any idea how long these are not available? Is there any other chance to try out these APIs? E.g. how to get a trial environment of SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central? Thx

Details:
https://api.sap.com/api/ECEmploymentInformation/tryout

Request URL
https://sandbox.api.sap.com/successfactors/odata/v2/EmpEmployment?$top=20

Response Body
{ "code": "SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE", "message": "Sandbox Try Out is temporarily unavailable for SAP SuccessFactors APIs, regret the inconvenience." }

Response Headers
Access-Control-Expose-Headers: set-cookie, x-http-method
Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *
Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: false
Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, PUT, POST, DELETE, PATCH
Connection: keep-alive
Content-Length: 140
Access-Control-Max-Age: 3628800
Date: Wed, 17 Jul 2024 08:28:19 GMT
Access-Control-Allow-Headers: set-cookie, origin, accept, maxdataserviceversion, apikey, accept-language, x-http-method, content-type, X-Requested-With
Content-Type: application/json

entry.title: Re: It's Trial Time for ABAP in SAP Business Technology Platform
entry.content:
Hi Sauranil,

A week back I too got the same issue. How it got resolved is try deleting the existing instance & create a new one with other email ID & create the service key & binding. Then create a new Project in ADT. It will work.

Regards,

Lakshmi

entry.title: Re: Ship.condition 02 loading grp 0003 plant MMC1 StLoc M...
entry.content:
Hello,
Did you try to fill the customizing table with the parameters mentioned in the error message?

entry.title: Re: SAC planning model - delete duplicate records
entry.content: @MaxT, you have to specify a measure either through MEMBERSET [d/Measure] = "XXXX" or directly in RESULTLOOKUPs

entry.title: Re: Google Play Store - Publish Rejected
entry.content: Hi @Dan_Wroblewski @MaiaraEllwanger @marihirvi request your help in resolving these

entry.title: Re: How to setup and configure SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
@MeenaPrakash You could:

  • Create an automation with Outlook to send it (but you'd a machine with Outlook connected)
  • Use an Action to call an API that sends mail (but you'd need an API)
  • Fix the error you get -- in the end you will need an SMTP server to send your mails. Maybe the configuration has an error?

entry.title: Re: Usage of ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) for developments in SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hi @hugopereira ,

this blog relates to developments inside of SAP BTP ABAP Environment, there is only tier 1 (cloud-ready) development possible. For setup of the ATC check variant for 3-tier developments in SAP S/4HANA systems (>= 2022 release) see please the blog https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-the-abap-test-cockpit-supports-you-to-adopt-abap-cloud/ba-p/13548202

Kind Regards,
Olga.

entry.title: Re: Renewal of SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hi dilipkumbhar,

Contact the Channel Sales Manager for the same. You can find the contact here:

SAP Business One Country Localizations & Contacts 

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: OKX Invitation Code: OK1907 [2024] Mystery Box
entry.content:
What is OKX invitation code?

The OKX exchange features a continuous referral program. You can participate using the OKX invitation code “OK1907” during sign-up. The exchange offers up to 10K USDT and two mystery boxes for creating an account. This guide will show you how to use the OKX invitation code 2024. Apart from the welcome offer, there are other benefits that you could enjoy.

entry.title: Re: Replacing bdc by suitable bapi
entry.content:
Hi Surya,

this is rather a Material Management question, not a Connectivity (network protocols) question or a Development (ABAP programming language) question. So I have added the Material Management tag.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps asking login for Integrations
entry.content: Is it possible to send the top-level link to your learning material, so I can see how the backend was created?

entry.title: Re: Learning Hub erwerben als Privatperson
entry.content:
Hallo @PatrickL,
um hier weiterhelfen zu  können, bitte ich Sie, mir bitte die Ticket-Nummer mitteilen.
Viele Grüße
Margit Wagner

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to express my sincere interest in the SAP digital skills initiative and to humbly request consideration for a free opportunity to obtain an SAP certification.

My current economic situation is quite challenging. I am struggling financially and already have a substantial loan that I am working hard to repay. Despite my best efforts, the high cost of the SAP certification is beyond my reach. This certification, however, is of utmost importance to me as my company is strongly encouraging me to obtain it to continue my career growth within the SAP ecosystem.

I believe I align with the objectives of the SAP digital skills initiative. I am a first-generation college student and economically very poor, which presents additional hurdles in my professional journey. As someone who faces financial hardships and is determined to advance in the technology industry, I see this certification as a crucial step towards achieving my professional goals. Furthermore, the opportunity to acquire these digital skills would significantly enhance my career prospects and enable me to contribute more effectively to my organization.

I am fully committed to undergoing the rigors of studying for the SAP certification and have a strong willingness to learn. I understand the value of this opportunity and am prepared to invest the necessary time and effort to succeed.

I kindly ask for your understanding and consideration of my request for a free certification opportunity. This support would not only alleviate my financial burden but also empower me to progress in my career and overcome the economic challenges I currently face.

Thank you very much for your time and consideration. I look forward to your positive response.

Warm regards,

Nishith Kumar Gupta

PFA the completion mail of the learning hub course module.

entry.title: Re: Stamp Duty Tax Configuration in SAP Business One for...
entry.content:
Hi @nareshcr77 ,

In essence, it's not possible to calculate tax at the document level, as details contained at the line level may be relevant for determining the tax, such as item, item group, g/l account, warehouse, and so on. Even though you might have an all-harmonized invoice where all the lines follow the same criteria for tax determination, the system structure is not designed for this, so you must inform the tax code on each line, as you are already doing.

The only thing I can think of as a workaround (considering I don't know the local rules), is using something that affects the document as a whole, like Freight, and create a new entry e.g. Stamp Duty Tax where you would set up the related G/L account to be credited in this transaction. The impacts of doing such a thing should be considered in all fronts, as usual. Sorry if that sound a little bit silly, but I can't go further here.

Good luck!

BR,
Felipe

entry.title: Re: SAP BPA Error while passing payload using postman - please help
entry.content: It seems that the inputs are defined as strings but you are sending integers. But without seeing the definition and the Postman call, it is tough to tell.

entry.title: Innovations Highlights from SAP Business Technology Platform - Sapphire 2024
entry.content:
Sapphire is always a highlight. But this year it was a special Sapphire. With this year´s event theme "Bring Out Your Best" our latest business AI innovations, products, and partnerships were highlighted. Take a look at this blog post where I want to focus on the most important announcements of SAP BTP at Sapphire 2024 (also non-AI related). In addition let´s explore innovation highlights coming up in the future. Enjoy reading on.

Clean Core Strategy with New SAP Build and ABAP Cloud Features

Following a clean core strategy means keeping your systems as unmodified as possible and creating your custom code in a way that does not effect upgrades and adoption of the latest innovations. But there is still the need to tailor your systems to your own businesses. To achieve this, we recommend that you go for side-by-side extensibility scenarios with SAP BTP, meaning that you build your own extensions to SAP systems on SAP BTP, whenever possible. SAP BTP offers three main options for this scenario: SAP Build low-code solutions, SAP Build Code and SAP BTP ABAP Environment.

If we look at ABAP, the first highlight is the Joule´s ABAP Developer capabilities, which will contain multiple features all tailored to increase developer efficiency. It will be the GitHub Copilot for the ABAP world embedded directly into the ABAP Development Tools in Eclipse (ADT). You will receive functionality embedded into wizards and an integrated chat. Planned GenAI features are explain ABAP code and CDS code, test and test data generation for ABAP and CDS, ABAP code completion, and many more. 

 

To simplify this process, we are building a way to access SAP Build directly from S/4HANA. Providing the ability to access SAP Build directly and with context from SAP S/4HANA, your development teams and their business stakeholders will be able to create new processes and process extensions much faster and more convenient than in the past. 

 

 

Guided experiences in SAP Build Work Zone

In addition the Guided experiences in SAP Build Work Zone let developers create step-by-step line-of-business workflows. This simplifies complex business processes through automation without custom code. With the Guided experiences, you can empower your workforce with seamless digital experiences tailored to their needs, boosting user satisfaction, engagement, and retention. You can automate tasks and streamline processes, allowing employees to focus on high-impact work.

Accelerate enterprise automation with AI

We are also enriching our Process Automation offering with Joule. Our GenAI-based copilot will help you to simply specify in natural language what kind of workflow or automation you would like to have. In addition our tools, with the help of different large language models, will help you either source these artifacts from available content, or they will generate new process and automation content for them using the power of AI.

Accelerate integration with AI

We believe that by embedding AI into SAP Integration Suite, you will be able to shorten project times and integrate applications and systems faster by using AI generated mappings, scripts, and integration flows without even needing to be a high end integration expert. The SAP Integration Suite will improve the quality of integration flows and business processes by helping you identify pre-built content packages or by supporting AI-generated artifacts that fit to your specific requirements. Same as with code or process automation artefacts, you will be able to generate integration artifacts, our so called integration flows, by leveraging generative AI and the Unified Customer Landscape service which provides your specific landscape details as context for the integration.

Anomaly detection with SAP Integration Suite

We are making use of machine-learning based capabilities in SAP Integration Suite to offer API anomaly detection. What this means is that we use Machine Learning to identify issues in your landscapes. Think of a sudden surge or drop in API calls, an increase in latency or an increase in the number of errors detected. We can identify this kind of unusual behavior and actively alert your stuff to these anomalies in API performance. This way, we can help identify and address issues before they escalate, minimizing disruptions and optimizing system performance. 

 

 

Simplified transition

How do I transition from SAP PI / PO to SAP Integration Suite? We know that many of you relying on PI/PO for the daily business and we want to make sure we safeguard the investments you have made. Therefore we will provide a simplified transition from SAP PO to SAP Integration Suite with features like mass migration, reduction of migration templates, and reduction of JMS queues using a pipeline concept. Also, there is a free assessment and planning services available where we provide customer specific recommendations on how to move your integration to the cloud.

If you want to learn more what´s new for Application Development, Automation and Integration on SAP BTP  read the blog post of @thomas_volmering.

Infuse AI in SAP Analytics Cloud

How do we evolve our portfolio in the space of Data and Analytics moving forward? First: We integrate Joule as your GenAI copilot in SAP Analytics Cloud. You can analyze, consume and create story content with Joule moving forward. You also have also the possibility to ask questions and get answers as charts. Or you can generate some scripts to make the story interaction for your end-users richer and more interactive. Remember the just ask feature? This will be integrated with Joule as well. The key thing to understand is that while the just ask feature is providing natural language query capabilities, Joule will be using this feature as well, but provide a more conversational experience in remembering the conversation and the user progress and integrations.

Extended capabilities in SAP Analytics Cloud

One more thing on Data and Analytics, as it touches both the themes of openness and connectivity. Later this year it is planned that SAP Analytics Cloud content will be able to natively be integrated with Microsoft PowerPoint. Using our add-in, you can intuitively connect to an SAP Analytics Cloud tenant and find user-created content to integrate into your presentation. For example stories, in which business users communicate business information using a combination of data and visual elements (like, building a heat map of North America illustrating where a company’s sales are overperforming and underperforming commercial expectations). Or Widgets, which are visual elements used to tell stories (for example, charts, tables, geographical maps, or buttons).

SAP Analytics Cloud will also let you connect to SQL data sources as live data connections. This eliminates the need for direct data replication, resulting in much faster access to real-time data, reduced data storage requirements, more reliable data consistency, improved system performance and lower costs.

More to come...

For me personally it has been a quite impressive and innovative Sapphire 2024. If you want to explore more highlights coming up in 2024 watch the replay of my session "Explore the road map of SAP BTP".

You did not make it in person or virtually? No worries, you still have the chance to watch the replays and especially the Opening Keynote of Christian Klein and Julia White. Explore the SAP Sapphire News Guide 2024  to learn more about the announcements.
Interested in more innovation highlights coming up? Then take a look at our Road Map Explorer. We do have more than 1000 innovation highlights planned for SAP BTP 2024.

Also be informed that this blog and SAP's strategy and possible future developments, products and or platforms directions and functionality are all subject to change and may be changed by SAP at any time for any reason without notice.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps Integration with SBPA (Task UI)
entry.content: Not yet anyway, but you can build UI5 form (granted much more complicated) instead of using the built-in form builder.

entry.title: Re: Issue with posting asset transactions during migratio...
entry.content:
We found the solution, it was a different kind of 'status'. In the app 'Make company code settings - asset accounting-specific', you can change the 'Transfer status' to 'Ongoing (Other postings allowed)'. If you set a transfer status without the allowance, the system blocks all manual asset postings.

Thanks for your attention.

Best regards,

Jan-Niklas Studt

entry.title: CDS view to find the Classification characteristic description field for a supplier
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am currently trying to implement Flexible workflow for PO on SAP public cloud based on the condition that if the Suppliers Classification characteristic description i.e.  P2P exemption is Yes/No. but i am unbale to find the CDS view liking the Supplier/Business partner and the Classification data for them. could you guys help if you know of any CDS view that i can link to achieve this requirement.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Tables for BW-Query Elements (where-used list)
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to find the tables in BW in which I can see where a characteristic with the filter/constant (e.g. company code = 1111) is used in the following BW query elements (where-used list):

Global restricted key figures
Filter
Local restricted key figures

Unfortunately, I have not found the best solution. We are on BW4HANA.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SBPA - How to end a branch without ending the process
entry.content: Can you explain the flow you want a little more? If you end a branch you simple don't put additional activities in it -- then when all branches complete the process continues to more activities (or ends).

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
As someone deeply passionate about embarking on a career in SAP consulting, I have dedicated significant time and effort to advancing my skills and knowledge within the SAP ecosystem. However, circumstances beyond my control pose a significant challenge in meeting the costs associated with the cost of taking a paid certification exam.

I am deeply discouraged by the possibility of not being able to pursue the certification due to financial limitations. It feels like a significant obstacle in my career and personal development journey. I recognize the importance of certification in today's competitive job market.

Additionally, as a member of an underrepresented community, I am committed to breaking barriers and achieving success in the tech industry. Obtaining the SAP certification is not only a personal goal but also a crucial step towards advancing my career aspirations and making a positive impact within my community.

I firmly believe that this certification will equip me with the necessary skills and knowledge to excel in SAP consulting and contribute effectively to the industry. Therefore, I am reaching out to kindly request your support in the form of a fee waiver for the SAP certification exam.

Your assistance would significantly alleviate the financial burden and enable me to focus wholeheartedly on preparing for and successfully passing the exam.
 
If given the chance, I will wholeheartedly dedicate myself to the certification process. I am determined to embody SAP's values and maintain the high standards of excellence that your certification is known for.
 
I hope you will kindly consider my request with compassion and understanding. Your support in this matter would be incredibly meaningful to me and would have a profound impact on my life.

PS: Attached is a completion mail of learning hub course

entry.title: Re: Fiori Horizon theme
entry.content: KBA is not available any more, but the problem still persits. May I ask for further information on this topic?

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to Loading SAP BW hierarchy to Datashp...
entry.content:
Hello @aczeitner 

I think this Blogs comes just in time for you 🙂 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/part-2-import-sap-bw-4hana-queries-into-sap-datasphere-using-sap-bw-4hana/ba-p/13759521 

There you have one example of the Customer Infoobject and all it's tables ... unfortunately it seems to work only with BW4 and BW Bridge.

If you have a BW on HANA, you probably need to create CDS Views to transfer the data into manually created Datasphere tables.

BR, Martin

entry.title: Unable to do SMT Mapping for the fields present in MARC_APS_EXT Table.
entry.content:
‘Target Stock Level’ and ‘Safety Stock Level’ fields are not present in SAP MDG UI but they are present in S4 GUI System under Advanced Planning section and for this Transparent table is MARC_ASPS_EXT in place of MARC.

We are doing development to bring these fields in MDG UI but we are unable to find these fields in MARC Table. Due to this we are not able to do SMT Mapping. During SMT Mapping of MDG_BS_MAT_MAP_2PP and  MDG_BS_MAT_MAP_2STA we are unable to see the fields in MARC Structure.

We’ve found a Transparent table : MARC_APS_EXT in which these fields are present but during SMT Mapping we are not able to view the structure of MARC_APS_EXT Table.

entry.title: Re: Are the SAP AIF related apps available in S/4HANA public cloud?
entry.content: could you please update you answer? When clicking on the link I get: Sorry We couldn't find that page. Go back to the SAP Help Portal home page.

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK SDK installation error
entry.content: @Jitendra_Kansal I tried Set-ExecutionPolicy -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Scope CurrentUser but it doesn't seem to be working for me. The other option 'run sh powershell -file main.ps1 check' which returns message 'can't execute binary', could you suggest plz ?

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK SDK installation error
entry.content:
here is my system policy details

Scope ExecutionPolicy

----- ---------------
MachinePolicy : RemoteSigned
UserPolicy : Undefined
Process : Undefined
CurrentUser : Bypass
LocalMachine : Bypass

entry.title: Re: how do I can create a Sourcing Request with service S4HanaRequestForQuotation?
entry.content: I just looking for the same scenario, but SAP doesn't give any help to configure as an standalone call, from an external system without using S/4 HANA as source RFQ system.

entry.title: Re-issue voided check
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

We are unable to find the option of re-issuing voided check in  SAP public cloud.

We had this functionality in on-premise to delete check information and re-issue the check in case it has been mistakenly voided after issue.

Kindly advise.

entry.title: Re: Post Material BOM | API_BILL_OF_MATERIAL_V2 - odata v2
entry.content: I was able to solve it

entry.title: Error received in ewm output
entry.content:
Hi guys,

When the customer issues the goods;

"Delivery XXXXXX item 20: Shipping method status prohibits goods issue

Message no. /SCWM/GOODS_MOVEMENT044"

error is received, I searched on the internet but could not find a solution, can you support me?

entry.title: Re: Task 5 - A "REST" service document (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs&quot
entry.content:
Hi @mwn 

By "still don't have access to the model" I am assuming you mean to the model processor, same error as before? 

I'm curious about the npm install command you ran, I'm assuming here that the editor / renderer on this platform has swallowed the @sap part? 

If both my assumptions are correct, then I would guess your issue is down to how you tried to update the CDS Development Kit. I don't know your local setup, but you probably want to install it globally, i.e. use the --global (or -g) option:

npm install --global @sap/cds-dk

HTH!

entry.title: Re: Execute custom logic at permission import
entry.content:
Dear Christian,

 IDs are case sensitive. The only exception are EMail addresses which are stored as lower case letters in the database (case insensitive). If you observe a different behavior please open a ticket with a reproduceable example.

Best regards Andreas Bettin

entry.title: Re: Post Material BOM | API_BILL_OF_MATERIAL_V2 - odata v2
Re: Post Material BOM | API_BILL_OF_MATERIAL_V2 - odata v2
entry.content:
This is the body JSON that I'm using:

{
    "Material": "SUPERBIKE",
    "Plant": "",
    "BillOfMaterialVariantUsage": "1",
    "BillOfMaterialVariant": "1",
    "BillOfMaterialAuthsnGrp": "",
    "BOMVersionStatus": "",
    "BOMTechnicalType": "M",
    "BOMGroup": "",
    "BOMHeaderText": "API test",
    "BOMAlternativeText": "",
    "BillOfMaterialStatus": "1",
    "BOMHeaderBaseUnit": "PC",
    "BOMHeaderQuantityInBaseUnit": "2"
}

entry.title: Re: MRP run on materials shared between plant and MRP area
entry.content:
see my original comment: ... First have a look at MRP customizing 'Define Storage Location and Supply Area Determination in BOM Explosion' ( SPRO ... MRP -> Procument Proposals -> Planned Orders ) .... .... and set the SLoc determination customizing for the component so that the SLoc is inherited from the prod. version.

If you dont success then you might want to describe the settings you tried and their results. Then maybe somebody is willing to help with further answers.

entry.title: Re: Renewal of SAP Business One
entry.content:
If these licenses are perpetual, you should still have access to the 33 licenses on the version you were when you stopped paying your AMC.

Your partner should be able to assist you with a quote from SAP to get up to date with your AMC. Depending on when you stopped paying the AMC you will have to pay backdated up to the present date to be able to upgrade to the latest version.

Else contact SAP directly if your partner is unable to assist

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Achieves International Business Communication Standards (IBCS) Re-Certificat
entry.content: Excellent blog and I'm very happy to see all these improvements on IBCS in the SAC stories! Thanks.

entry.title: Intercompany payment runs through an international account
entry.content:
Posting on behalf of my finance team:

We are implementing SAP S/4HANA public cloud for a UK based client which has multiple companies in UK and NL.  They are unable to pay a NL company invoice on a payment run through a NL account as this entity does not have a bank account.  Workarounds with dummy accounts have been suggested, but can you explain why international bank payments are not standard SAP practice in SAP S/4HANA public cloud?

entry.title: Re: SAPCAR GUI
entry.content:
Hello folks,

this useful utility seems to be not available anymore. The download links reply with a 404 page.

Is there a backup somewhere or a sucessor? Should I look somewhere else?

 

Kind Regards

Eric

entry.title: Unable to reduce / clean up request reduction in ADSO ( House Keeping activities )
Re: Is there a way to inherit authorization setting from...
entry.content:
Hello @aczeitner 

I'm not aware of it that you could somehow generate Datasphere Access Controls (Tables & Views) out of SAP BW authorizations.

You probably need to create all the tables and DACs manually. See this blog as example:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-datasphere-implementing-row-level-security-using-data-access-controls/ba-p/13577455

Maybe it helps to check table RSECVAL_STRING in you BW for all auth. relevant objects and the attribute values.

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: New Extensibility Guide for S/4HANA is available
entry.content: Sorry, I cannot comment on this.

entry.title: Re: How to restrict users from accessing B1_SHF Attachment

Nidhi Singh

entry.title: Re: Video URL Link in Helptile in Companion
entry.content: Hi, thank you for your reply. No issues with embedded version, so we can work with that. 🙂

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now error: configuration file could not be...
entry.content:
Hi Alex and Karen, 

I pumped into the same situation error and it´s great to learn from your experience. 

I could access these sub-group (i.e. Knowledge Management, Manufacturing, etc.) through its published link, but not the Group BA Content. 

Even though I´ve followed the advice of making sure all the objects within "BA Content" are published, whenever I click on BA Content link, this error keeps popping up "Necessary Configuration File cannot be loaded":


I would appreciate a lot if you could share any advice. Many thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Facing the Unhandled Exception Error while doing the...
entry.content:
Hi Krish_SAP 

Please check if issue is same as in note   3377581.

If not, please let us know exact version of SAP Business One and exact steps to reproduce the issue.

Thank You.

Kind Regards
Nidhi

entry.title: Re: no action control found while creating Vehicle master
entry.content:
In T code VELOS, enter the Vehicle model, plant, primary and secondary action control as shown in the below image.

then after if you got other error like "No valid configuration profile found for MARA......"

for this error go to T Code CU41, there maintain the profile for the material...

if it shows as it is already maintained go to CU42 and check whether the status is released or locked, (it should be released, so make it as released)

or else, if you are unable to make it as released then, go to MM02, go to classification tab, there you maintain some class as shown in the below image.

entry.title: TECO status
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

1. Please tell me the sequence of settlement scenarios for the capital project.

2. After TECO status, is a good issue possible or not?

I checked the system status (BS23). Good movement is allowed, but when i create good issue against reservation I face some issues.

Please Find attached Screenshots.

entry.title: Re: Working with Cross HDI Container Access Scenarios in SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Sreedevi,

Followed all the steps still facing below issue, could you please suggest how this can be resolved.

Error: service ServiceName_1 not found; the service definition does not exist.

Regards,

Prem Kumar S
